title: BrowserConfig
description: Optional per-definition browser mode override. When present in a definition JSON, controls which browser pool the definition executes in.

mode.description: Browser mode for this definition. 'local' launches a local browser; 'remote' connects to the Azure Playwright workspace.

channel.description: Browser channel for local mode (e.g., 'chrome', 'msedge'). Ignored for remote mode. When null, uses bundled Chromium.

headless.description: Whether to run in headless mode for local launches. Ignored for remote mode.
